Innate Abilities, Weirdness & Mutations

You have an unnaturally thin skeletal structure. (Dex +6, Stealth+++)
A powerful demonic guardian rushes to your aid.
A meltable icy envelope protects you from harm. (AC +0)
You are extremely robust. (+30% HP)
A meltable shield of frost defends you. (SH +0)
You have a sharp stinger which inflicts weakening toxins.
You draw destruction from the ruthless spite of Dis.
You bear the Mark of Atrocity.

Message History

The starcursed mass engulfs your steelbarb worm!
The blink frog hits you but does no damage.
The starcursed mass barely misses your steelbarb worm.
The blink frog blinks! A starcursed mass splits.
Your steelbarb worm hits the starcursed mass!
The starcursed mass is skewered by barbed spikes.
The starcursed mass shudders and is absorbed by its neighbour.
The blink frog evades a web.
The worldbinder calls forth creatures from the Crypt!
The apocalypse crab bites your Hell Sentinel!
Your Hell Sentinel's magic leaks into the air.
The apocalypse crab claws your Hell Sentinel but does no damage.
Your steelbarb worm hits the starcursed mass but does no damage.
You can act again.
You hit the worldbinder. You sting the worldbinder.
The worldbinder is moderately damaged.
The thrashing horror tramples your steelbarb worm!
Your steelbarb worm holds its ground!
The thrashing horror tramples your steelbarb worm!
Your steelbarb worm holds its ground!
You block the thrashing horror's attack. x2
The thrashing horror tramples your steelbarb worm.
Your steelbarb worm holds its ground!
The thrashing horror closely misses your steelbarb worm.
Your steelbarb worm hits the thrashing horror!!
The thrashing horror is destroyed!
Makhleb accepts your kill.
You block the blink frog's attack.
Your zykzyl overflows with resentment.
The smoke demon is enfeebled! A starcursed mass splits.
The starcursed mass oozes through a web.
You block the worldbinder's attack. The worldbinder hits you.
